overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a makeshift encampment on the outskirts of a neon-lit metropolis. The player moves from a small food stall area past scattered trash and palm trees toward a campfire gathering, with towering glass skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban fringe pathway with makeshift food stall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a trash-strewn path past a small illuminated food stall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking toward the camera on the path

entered.detail: small green-roofed structure with illuminated interior and signage
skyscraper with illuminated 07 signage and large red digital billboard
large vertical billboard displaying a face with red neon lighting
white concrete bench beside the dirt path
tall palm trees lining the pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a small food stall with a green roof on the left, walking along a trash-strewn dirt path. A white park bench sits on the right, while towering glass skyscrapers with neon billboards rise in the distance. A pedestrian in white approaches from ahead as the camera moves forward through the urban fringe.

events.description: moving away from the food stall into a more open area lined with palm trees
pink neon light from the large curved structure becomes visible and illuminates the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path toward a large neon-lit structure visible through the trees

entered.detail: large curved metal framework illuminated with bright pink and purple neon lights

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the camera moves away from the stall area into a tree-lined route. A massive curved structure with bright pink neon lighting becomes visible on the left, casting colored light across the scene. The distant skyscrapers fade into the background as the camera progresses toward the encampment area.

events.description: warm orange firelight from the campfire becomes the primary illumination source
ego slows down and stops near the campfire group to observe the NPCs

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a group of NPCs gathered around a campfire in the encampment

notable_agents.action: standing figure holding a weapon near the campfire
seated figure in red chair drinking from a bottle beside the fire

entered.detail: burning fire pit with flames and embers providing warm orange light
makeshift tents and tarp shelters in a homeless encampment
derelict cars and trucks parked among the encampment
stacked wooden pallets and supply crates

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at a makeshift encampment centered around a burning campfire. Several NPCs gather around the fire - some standing, one seated in a red chair drinking. Abandoned vehicles and tents dot the area, while the pink neon structure now appears on the right side of the frame. The warm firelight contrasts with the cool blue night as the player stops to observe the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty urban fringe into the heart of a makeshift nighttime encampment. It begins on a trash-strewn dirt path beside a green-roofed food stall and a white park bench, with towering neon skyscrapers looming in the far distance. As the camera moves forward past a pedestrian in white, the path opens into a tree-lined route where a massive curved structure with bright pink neon lighting emerges on the left, casting a vivid glow across the environment. The scene then shifts away from the distant skyline toward a gathering centered around a burning campfire, where NPCs stand or sit in red chairs amidst abandoned vehicles and tents. Finally, the camera comes to a halt, capturing the contrast between the warm firelight and the cool blue night as the pink neon structure now frames the right side of the view.
